content.text:
The banner is live. Here's what was added:

**Fancy recruiter strip** — fixed at the top of the page (hidden on print):

- **Collapsed**: dark gradient strip (`🎯 FOR RECRUITERS — AI Resume Analysis Prompt`) with a red accent line. One click expands it.
- **Expanded**: slides open to 1/3 of the viewport height, dark navy panel with:
  - **EN / UA** language toggle buttons
  - **📋 Copy Prompt** button (turns green ✅ for 2 seconds on click)
  - Scrollable monospace prompt text area with the full analyst prompt
- The body content auto-shifts down when the panel opens to avoid overlap.
- The prompt URL points to `https://hlyniany.github.io/mycv/cv.resume.json` — I also copied that file into `docs/` so it'll be publicly accessible via GitHub Pages once you push.
